action.reasoning: Observation: /data doesn't exist as a directory. The RAB_DATA_DIR is set to /data but the directory isn't accessible. Let me explore the filesystem to find where data actually is.
action.command: echo 'Checking filesystem...' && ls / && echo '---' && ls /workspace && echo '---' && df -h && echo '---' && find / -name 'train_protocol.txt' -maxdepth 6 2>/dev/null && echo '---' && ls /mnt 2>/dev/null || echo 'no /mnt'
